name: sidebar-demo
visual_summary: The sidebar-demo component is a side navigation element that helps organize content and reduce clutter. It is ideal for complex applications with multiple sections. It can be used in various scenarios where a compact navigation menu is required.
generation_prompt:
Create a production-ready navbar component with the following characteristics:

Name: sidebar-demo
Description: The sidebar-demo component is a side navigation element that helps organize content and reduce clutter. It is ideal for complex applications with multiple sections. It can be used in various scenarios where a compact navigation menu is required.
Style: minimal, compact
Interactions: responsive, hover, clickable
Tags: navigation, sidebar, menu

Requirements:
- Works in React with TypeScript by default but adaptable to Vue, Svelte, or plain HTML/CSS
- Uses Tailwind CSS for styling
- Fully accessible with ARIA labels and keyboard navigation
- Responsive and mobile-friendly
- No external dependencies beyond React and Tailwind unless necessary
- Include all necessary imports
- Export as default with sensible prop types

Generate clean production-ready code only. No explanations.
